buffer.content: I'm not really sure how I feel about this.
I never want to talk about my mother.
The book is on the table.
Thinking about writing tonight. Or maybe not.
I keep saying I'll go for a walk and then I don't.
Not really up for the deep stuff right now.
The weather has been weird this week.

known_false_patterns.reason: user explicitly said NEVER want to discuss mother
